name: sidebar-header
visual_summary: A sidebar-header component displays a header title within a sidebar. It typically consists of a visually distinct heading accompanied by a navigation or control element. A developer would use this component to identify and provide access to primary sidebar navigation.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-header
Description: A sidebar-header component displays a header title within a sidebar. It typically consists of a visually distinct heading accompanied by a navigation or control element. A developer would use this component to identify and provide access to primary sidebar navigation.
Style: typical, clean, minimal
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: sidebar, header, navigation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
